creator: corvid@openmailbox.org
text:
(I'm trying 13.0-BETA1.)

I remember someone mentioning these appearing when 12.2 came out, and someone seemed sorry/dismayed that whatever bug that caused them had slipped through, and so I'd imagined this would have been fixed for sure in 13.

But there's still time!

I don't remember what the proper name is for those sphere things, or what causes them to appear, but I'm sure you'll know what I'm talking about.
